Class DecimalTime

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.history.time.Time
org.jscience.social.history.clock.DecimalTime
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DecimalTime extends Time
Represents time using a decimal system (10h/100m/100s per day). Based on the French Revolutionary Time system.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
